title: fix security-opt generate kube
body:
fix #4950
add selinux options from --security-opt from the container to generate kube result

Signed-off-by: Qi Wang <qiwan@redhat.com>

comments.body:
Kube.yaml supports type not disabled.  
```
podman --security-opt label:disable 
```
means
kube.yaml
```
security_opt:
     type spc_t
```
